Apache/2.4.49.description: Path traversal and remote code execution vulnerability in Apache HTTP Server 2.4.49
Apache/2.4.49.remediation: Upgrade to Apache HTTP Server 2.4.51 or later

Apache/2.4.50.description: Incomplete fix for CVE-2021-41773 allows path traversal and RCE
Apache/2.4.50.remediation: Upgrade to Apache HTTP Server 2.4.51 or later

Apache/2.4.7.description: FilesMatch bypass via newline character in filename
Apache/2.4.7.remediation: Upgrade to Apache HTTP Server 2.4.30 or later

Apache/2.2.34.description: Optionsbleed - use-after-free in HTTP OPTIONS method
Apache/2.2.34.remediation: Upgrade to Apache HTTP Server 2.4.28 or later

Apache/2.2.14.remediation: Upgrade to Apache HTTP Server 2.2.21 or later

nginx/1.14.0.description: HTTP request smuggling via error pages in nginx 1.14.x

nginx/1.16.0.description: HTTP/2 Data Dribble - resource exhaustion DoS

nginx/1.6.2.description: Resolver NULL pointer dereference causing worker process crash

OpenSSH_7.4.description: User enumeration vulnerability via malformed authentication requests

OpenSSH_6.6.description: Information leak via roaming support allows private key theft
OpenSSH_6.6.remediation: Upgrade to OpenSSH 7.1p2 or later and disable UseRoaming

OpenSSH_5.3.description: Arbitrary code execution via agent forwarding with crafted PKCS#11 modules

OpenSSH_4.3.remediation: Upgrade to a modern OpenSSH version and use CTR/GCM ciphers

vsftpd 2.3.4.description: Backdoor command execution vulnerability in vsftpd 2.3.4
vsftpd 2.3.4.remediation: Upgrade to vsftpd 3.0.0 or later from official sources

vsftpd 2.0.5.description: Denial of service via memory consumption on large file downloads

ProFTPD 1.3.5.description: Remote code execution via mod_copy module allowing arbitrary file read/write

Microsoft-IIS/7.5.description: Buffer overflow in WebDAV service allows remote code execution
Microsoft-IIS/7.5.remediation: Upgrade to IIS 10.0 or apply security patch KB3042553

Microsoft-IIS/6.0.description: Buffer overflow RCE via crafted PROPFIND request to WebDAV
Microsoft-IIS/6.0.remediation: Migrate to a modern version of IIS (10.0+)

PHP/5.6.description: Remote code execution via env_path_info underflow in PHP-FPM

PHP/7.0.description: Remote code execution via env_path_info underflow in PHP-FPM

Exim 4.87.description: The Return of the WIZard - RCE via crafted recipient address

Postfix 2.11.description: Privilege escalation via symlink attack on postdrop setgid binary

MySQL 5.5.description: Remote root code execution via configuration file manipulation

MySQL 5.6.description: Remote root code execution via configuration file manipulation

PostgreSQL 9.3.description: Stack buffer overflow via setting a password with a crafted length

Tomcat/8.5.0.description: Ghostcat - AJP connector file read/include vulnerability

Tomcat/7.0.description: Remote code execution via JSP upload when PUT method enabled

Redis/3.2.description: Heap corruption and RCE via crafted commands to Lua scripting engine

Elasticsearch/1.4.description: Remote code execution via Groovy scripting engine sandbox bypass

MongoDB 3.4.description: Authentication bypass when authorization is not enabled
MongoDB 3.4.remediation: Enable authentication and upgrade to MongoDB 3.6+

Samba 4.5.9.description: SambaCry - Remote code execution via writable share (EternalRed)

OpenSSL/1.0.1.description: Heartbleed - TLS heartbeat extension memory disclosure

OpenSSL/1.0.2.description: Padding oracle in AES-NI CBC MAC check

Dovecot 2.2.description: Buffer overflow in IMAP/ManageSieve protocol parsers

Squid/3.5.description: Heap buffer overflow in URN processing allows RCE

lighttpd/1.4.35.description: Log injection via malformed HTTP headers

Node.js/8.0.remediation: Upgrade to Node.js 10.x LTS or later

Jenkins/2.150.description: Remote code execution via crafted Pipeline script sandbox bypass

Jetty/9.2.description: HTTP request smuggling via chunk length parsing

Webmin/1.920.description: Unauthenticated remote code execution via password reset page

Drupal/7.57.description: Drupalgeddon 2 - Remote code execution via Form API
Drupal/7.57.remediation: Upgrade to Drupal 7.58 or 8.5.1 or later

WordPress/4.7.description: Content injection via REST API endpoint privilege escalation

Bind 9.10.description: Assertion failure in buffer.c allows remote DoS

21.description: FTP transmits credentials in plaintext. Consider using SFTP instead.
21.remediation: Disable FTP and use SFTP (SSH File Transfer Protocol) on port 22

23.description: Telnet transmits all data including passwords in plaintext with no encryption.
23.remediation: Disable Telnet entirely and use SSH (port 22) for remote access

25.description: Open SMTP relay can be abused for spam and phishing attacks.
25.remediation: Ensure SMTP requires authentication and uses STARTTLS encryption

53.description: Open DNS resolver can be used for DNS amplification DDoS attacks.
53.remediation: Restrict DNS to authorized clients only, disable recursion for external queries

110.description: POP3 transmits email credentials in plaintext.
110.remediation: Use POP3S (port 995) with TLS encryption instead

135.description: Windows RPC endpoint mapper frequently targeted by worms and exploits.
135.remediation: Block port 135 at the firewall for external access

139.description: NetBIOS session service exposes file shares and is targeted by malware.
139.remediation: Disable NetBIOS over TCP/IP and block at the firewall

143.description: IMAP transmits email credentials in plaintext.
143.remediation: Use IMAPS (port 993) with TLS encryption instead

445.description: SMB is frequently targeted (EternalBlue, WannaCry). Extremely dangerous if exposed.
445.remediation: Block SMB at the perimeter firewall, never expose to the internet

512.description: Remote execution service with weak authentication.
512.remediation: Disable rexec and use SSH for remote command execution

513.description: Remote login with no encryption, easily spoofable.
513.remediation: Disable rlogin and use SSH for remote access

514.description: Remote shell with IP-based authentication only, trivially exploitable.
514.remediation: Disable rsh and use SSH for remote shell access

1433.description: Microsoft SQL Server exposed to network. Target for brute-force attacks.
1433.remediation: Restrict access to trusted IPs only, never expose to the internet

1521.description: Oracle Database listener exposed. Target for TNS poisoning attacks.
1521.remediation: Restrict listener to localhost or trusted IPs, enable TNS encryption

3306.description: MySQL database exposed to network. Target for brute-force and injection.
3306.remediation: Bind MySQL to localhost (127.0.0.1) and use SSH tunnels for remote access

3389.description: Remote Desktop Protocol is a frequent target for brute-force and BlueKeep exploits.
3389.remediation: Use VPN for RDP access, enable NLA, and restrict to trusted IPs

5432.remediation: Bind to localhost and use pg_hba.conf to restrict client connections

5900.description: VNC often uses weak authentication and no encryption.
5900.remediation: Use VNC over SSH tunnel, enforce strong passwords

6379.description: Redis often runs without authentication. Allows arbitrary command execution.
6379.remediation: Enable requirepass, bind to localhost, never expose to the internet

8080.description: Alternative HTTP port often used for development/proxy servers.
8080.remediation: Ensure proper authentication and disable directory listing

9200.description: Elasticsearch often runs without authentication, exposing all indexed data.
9200.remediation: Enable X-Pack security, bind to localhost, never expose to the internet

27017.description: MongoDB often runs without authentication, exposing all databases.
27017.remediation: Enable authentication, bind to localhost, use TLS

Strict-Transport-Security.description: HSTS - Forces browsers to use HTTPS, preventing downgrade attacks

Content-Security-Policy.description: CSP - Prevents XSS, clickjacking, and code injection attacks

X-Frame-Options.description: Prevents clickjacking by controlling iframe embedding

X-XSS-Protection.description: Enables browser XSS filtering (legacy, but still useful)

Referrer-Policy.description: Controls how much referrer information is shared with other sites

Permissions-Policy.description: Controls which browser features the site can use (camera, microphone, etc.)
